changelog.title: Validation-mode + market-as-strategy
changelog.summary: Each FanDuel market is now its own strategy. Paper opens up for under-sampled strategies. Day 1 launch.

Added: 🎯 Bet Builder tab — FanDuel-style parlay slip: search filter, smart suggestions (best edge \ anchor \ lottery), save\load slips to localStorage, mobile bottom-sheet drawer, 12-leg cap, ±$ stake step buttons.
🔥 Most Confident Plays Today panel on Today tab — top picks from scout cache ranked by risk-adjusted edge, with strategy attribution.
🎯 Target Strategies card on Strategies tab — source-of-truth list of every market the engine scores (synced from code, not Notion).

📊 Journal tab overhaul: Daily Brief auto-summary, Strategy Attribution sparklines, Insights Panel (auto-detected patterns: tier ROI, market ROI, streaks, edge buckets), CLV Tracker scatter, Quick Reflection template composer.
Form Leaders dropdown now lists all 18 strategies (team-level shows explanatory state).
📣 OS-Updates tab (this one!) — release notes following keepachangelog.com format.
Bot personality: cautious-bettor flavor lines rotated daily in lock summaries via lib\v2_telegram_voice.py.
BvP factor wired into combined_factor — career batter-vs-pitcher history influences scoring stack.
Changed: Market = Strategy refactor: every FanDuel market is its own strategy (was 12 grouped names, now 18 individual). Pick attribution per-market so you can tell which is printing.
Validation-mode paper: daily cap 20u → 30u, WATCH tier opens for paper at 0.25× Kelly. LIVE unchanged (still WATCH-blocked, still 5u cap).
FanDuel line lock re-score: picks re-score against verified FD price at lock if the line moved since scout (no more stale-line bets).
NRFI v2 model: weighted blend (pitcher 0.65 \ offense 0.35), Bayesian shrinkage toward 0.73 prior, park-runs + temp + umpire-K modifiers.
Today tab simplified: removed factor chips (park \ NRFI prob \ hot batters). Now just slate + most confident plays.
Form (L10) → Form Leaders. Added stale-data fallback (uses most recent v2_form_*.json when today's hasn't fired yet).
Dashboard cosmetic refresh: Inter font, JetBrains Mono for code, amber accent palette, polished cards with hover-lift, mobile horizontal-scroll tabs.
Bet Builder moved to tab position 2 (right after Today).
Notion Strategy DB synced to engine: 8 archived, 15 created.
Fixed: Telegram bot wasn't replying to operator DMs (DM allow-list bug). Added TELEGRAM_OPERATOR_USER_IDS env var + \whoami \ping public commands.
GitHub Pages auto-deploy stuck in workflow mode (build_type=workflow). Switched to legacy 'Deploy from a branch' — auto-publishes on every commit, ~60s propagation.
NRFI ranking discrepancy: Top NRFI panel hid thin-sample games, Games to Watch didn't. Now consistent, with ⚠ thin \ ⚠ prior-only badges.
Form tab empty when today's form-discovery hadn't fired. Now falls back to most recent file with stale-day badge.
5 .bat files had Unix LF line endings — normalized to CRLF (caught by health-check).
Removed: Telegram Bot dedicated tab (replaced by this OS-Updates tab; bot status moved to Settings).
Top NRFI Plays standalone section on Today tab (consolidated into Most Confident Plays).
How picks are scored decoder card from Today tab (moved to per-row tooltips).

changelog.title: Public dashboard + bot bidirectional
changelog.summary: Dashboard goes public via GitHub Pages. Telegram bot accepts \commands from the operator.

Added: Public dashboard URL: https:\\daviddubray123-star.github.io\bettingos-dashboard\ — CDN-backed, multi-user, stable.
Auto-publish pipeline: dashboard-refresh.bat → lib\v2_gh_publish.py uses GitHub Contents API to push index.html + data.json after every rebuild.
Telegram bot listener (scripts\v2_tg_listener.py) accepts \status, \picks, \recap, \pause, \resume, \help. Runs as WTS daemon.
Changed: Strategy Performance table now reads active list dynamically from Notion instead of hardcoded label.

changelog.title: MLB-only focus + v2 simplification
changelog.summary: Engine consolidated to MLB during the master-MLB-first phase. NBA \ NHL \ UFC \ WNBA strategies archived.

Added: 11-factor scoring stack: statcast, park, handedness, pitcher matchup, weather, last-10, team form, player performer, BvP, umpire, bullpen.
Tier-based confidence buckets (LOCK \ STRONG \ SIDE \ WATCH) from risk-adjusted edge.
Changed: Sample floor for player props lowered 10 → 7 (early-season accommodation).
Removed: NBA \ NHL \ UFC \ WNBA active strategies (archived in Notion).

recommendations: Approaching monthly cap — tighten scout-only-MLB until rollover or pause non-essential sports.

recommendations.text: [PERSISTED 6 RUNS] Factor 'statcast' DEMOTE: when bullish (>1.05), hit-rate 49.1% vs neutral 66.7% (lift -17.6pp on n=110). This factor is currently anti-predictive — consider halving its strength weight or moving to status='partial'.
[PERSISTED 6 RUNS] [ELECTRICIAN] MLB lineup cache (lineup_823708.json) is 102.5h old (threshold 36h). Upstream task may have failed.

[PERSISTED 3 RUNS] Tier STRONG STAKES TOO BIG: hit rate 72.5% looks healthy (expected 60%) but ROI -12.5% on n=69 means losses outsize wins. Reduce stake size for this tier — realized edge is smaller than the stake table assumes.

[PERSISTED 7 RUNS] Factor 'handedness' DEMOTE: when bullish (>1.05), hit-rate 38.7% vs neutral 63.6% (lift -24.9pp on n=62). This factor is currently anti-predictive — consider halving its strength weight or moving to status='partial'.

[PERSISTED 7 RUNS] Tier LOCK UNDERDOG-PAYS: hit rate 54.7% below expected 70% (delta -15.3pp) BUT ROI +22.2% on n=53. Bigger underdogs are landing — don't tighten this gate. Lens working as intended; the calibration table just expects too high a hit rate for this tier's odds mix.
[PERSISTED 3 RUNS] Strategy 'MLB Total Runs' PROMOTE candidate: 61.1% hit rate and +8.2% ROI on n=36. If pattern holds another week, consider unlocking LIVE access (currently paper-only?).

[PERSISTED 6 RUNS] [ACCOUNTANT] 27 LIVE pick(s) staked off-table. Example: STRONG tier @ $8.00 vs table expects $4.50. Likely operator manually adjusted stake at FD — track in \bankroll correction notes.

[PERSISTED 7 RUNS] Tier WATCH BROKEN: hit rate 16.7% (expected 45%, delta -28.3pp) AND ROI -34.2% on n=24. Both metrics negative — tier is structurally losing. Tighten the edge_pp gate or kill the tier entirely.

[PERSISTED 7 RUNS] Strategy 'MLB Batter Total Bases Alt' DEMOTE candidate: 27.3% hit rate on n=22. Either model assumptions are wrong on this market or book has tightened. Pause and audit factor weights for this strategy.
[PERSISTED 7 RUNS] Tier SIDE TRUE SLACK: hit rate 66.7% AND ROI +8.3% both beat expectations on n=21. Loosening the edge_pp gate here would likely ship more profitable picks.
[PERSISTED 6 RUNS] Strategy 'MLB Run Line' PROMOTE candidate: 78.9% hit rate and +17.7% ROI on n=19. If pattern holds another week, consider unlocking LIVE access (currently paper-only?).
[PERSISTED 7 RUNS] Player TJ Rumfield WEAK track record: 17% hit (shrunk to 31.8% w\ prior) \ -39.7% ROI on n=12. Engine has been wrong on him — consider stake reduction or fade when he reappears.

[PERSISTED 7 RUNS] COVERAGE GAPS: 11 engine strategies have ZERO picks since the 5\14 reset. team-markets: MLB F5 Moneyline, MLB F5 Total, MLB NRFI · batter-props: MLB Batter H+R+RBI, MLB Batter HR, MLB Batter Hits, MLB Batter RBIs, MLB Batter Runs, MLB Batter Total Bases, MLB Batter Walks · parlays: MLB NRFI Parlay. Either the strategy_match table is mis-wired (engine code can't actually fire these), or upstream gates (§111 demand, edge_pp, sample) are too tight. Audit lib\v2_scorer.py STRATEGY_BY_SPORT_MARKET vs what's reaching the lock.

[PERSISTED 3 RUNS] Strategy 'MLB Batter RBIs Alt' DEMOTE candidate: 20.0% hit rate on n=10. Either model assumptions are wrong on this market or book has tightened. Pause and audit factor weights for this strategy.

[PERSISTED 7 RUNS] CLV PIPELINE DEAD: every one of the last 10 picks has CLV exactly 0.0%. Real CLV is always noisy ±2-5%; uniform 0 means the closing-line lookup isn't writing back to picks. Per CLAUDE.md, CLV+ is our PRIMARY edge signal — without it we can't tell good picks from lucky ones. Check noon-confirm or settle CLV write step.

[PERSISTED 6 RUNS] [ELECTRICIAN] Operator has overridden bankroll 10 times in past 7 days. Chronic engine-vs-FD drift suggests stake sizing or settle math is off. Audit average drift magnitude in logs\bankroll_corrections.jsonl.

[PERSISTED 6 RUNS] [ELECTRICIAN] 10 Odds API market(s) have no engine strategy mapping in STRATEGY_BY_SPORT_MARKET: (nba, ASSISTS), (nba, POINTS), (nba, REBOUNDS), (nba, THREES_MADE), (nhl, ASSISTS)... +5 more. Candidates from these markets get scored but get strategy_match=None and may be filtered out downstream.

[PERSISTED 3 RUNS] Factor 'weather' DEMOTE: when bullish (>1.05), hit-rate 50.0% vs neutral 66.7% (lift -16.7pp on n=8). This factor is currently anti-predictive — consider halving its strength weight or moving to status='partial'.
[PERSISTED 3 RUNS] Player Spencer Steer STRONG track record: 100% hit (shrunk to 70.6% w\ prior) \ +22.3% ROI on n=7. Engine reliably picks this player — consider tier-boost when he reappears.
[PERSISTED 7 RUNS] 6 HIGH-edge (≥8pp) losers in the postmortem journal. Calibration is over-confident — engine reports high edges that don't materialize. Tighten LOCK gate to edge≥10pp + sample≥30.
[PERSISTED 7 RUNS] Player Miguel Vargas STRONG track record: 100% hit (shrunk to 68.8% w\ prior) \ +24.8% ROI on n=6. Engine reliably picks this player — consider tier-boost when he reappears.
[PERSISTED 6 RUNS] [ELECTRICIAN] Bankroll moved 11.1% in one update on 2026-05-21T03:59:33.175747+00:00: $152.83 → $169.77. Could be operator fat-finger or a real reset — verify intent.

[PERSISTED 6 RUNS] [ACCOUNTANT] 2026-05-16: engine running $167.12, operator confirmed $154.40, gap $-12.72. Engine math doesn't match reality on this day — likely stake-size mismatch between recorded and real FD placement.

[PERSISTED 6 RUNS] [ACCOUNTANT] 2026-05-19: engine running $167.12, operator confirmed $145.45, gap $-21.67. Engine math doesn't match reality on this day — likely stake-size mismatch between recorded and real FD placement.

[PERSISTED 6 RUNS] [ACCOUNTANT] 2026-05-20: engine running $190.98, operator confirmed $152.83, gap $-38.15. Engine math doesn't match reality on this day — likely stake-size mismatch between recorded and real FD placement.
Player Zach Neto WEAK track record: 20% hit (shrunk to 40.0% w\ prior) \ -40.0% ROI on n=5. Engine has been wrong on him — consider stake reduction or fade when he reappears.
